title: SPARQL DISTINCT gives duplicates in Virtuoso
description:
There is a problem with distinct when there are floats involved.
Here it is the error commented and reproduced.
http://stackoverflow.com/questions/38371049/sparql-distinct-gives-duplicates-in-virtuoso
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sample_data (id Int32, label String, depth Float64, station String);
INSERT INTO sample_data (id, label, depth, station) VALUES (1, 'CID_1', 10.5, 'Station_A');
INSERT INTO sample_data (id, label, depth, station) VALUES (2, 'CID_1', 10.5, 'Station_B');
INSERT INTO sample_data (id, label, depth, station) VALUES (3, 'CID_2', 20.0, 'Station_A');
SELECT DISTINCT label, toString(depth) AS depth_as_string, station FROM sample_data WHERE label LIKE 'CID%';
key_bug_features: SPARQL DISTINCT with float values causes duplicates
